site_metadata.name: Dimitris Vatistas
site_metadata.title: Web Developer & Web Designer
site_metadata.description: Dimitris Vatistas is a web developer and designer crafting high-performance digital products. Specializing in React, Next.js, and futuristic UI/UX design.

personal_info.bio: I'm Dimitris Vatistas, a developer and designer building high-performance digital products that balance aesthetics and function. I specialize in bridging the gap between design and engineering, moving from Figma prototypes to production-ready applications in React and Next.js.

experience.description: Mastered Python fundamentals and software engineering principles through Stanford's intensive online course.
Founded and led a digital loyalty startup, overseeing product strategy and full-stack development.
Built secure, privacy-focused age verification systems using machine learning models.

projects.title: CIPHER
projects.description: An AI coding assistant that writes, edits, and runs code in real-time with live preview.

caseStudy.problem: Most AI coding tools are slow, require complex setup, and lack real-time execution.
caseStudy.solution: A powerful in-browser AI coding environment with instant live preview and built-in tools.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Built with Next.js, multiple specialized models, and a custom sandboxed execution environment.
caseStudy.results: Supports 6 models with <100ms first token and up to 1M tokens/day for free users.

projects.title: QRoyal
projects.description: A smart digital loyalty program that replaces physical cards with one universal QR-based pass.

caseStudy.problem: Physical loyalty cards are easily lost and businesses struggle to track customer engagement effectively.
caseStudy.solution: A universal digital pass system using QR codes for seamless check-ins and rewards.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Implemented a serverless architecture with Firebase for real-time updates and scalability.
caseStudy.results: Handled 5,000+ active users and improved customer retention for partner businesses by 25%.

projects.title: STRM
projects.description: A clean, minimalist, and completely ad-free streaming platform for movies and TV shows.

caseStudy.problem: Most free streaming sites are cluttered with intrusive ads, pop-ups, and trackers that ruin the user experience.
caseStudy.solution: A high-performance streaming platform that aggregates content from secure third-party providers with zero ads.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Built with Next.js and a custom proxy layer to ensure fast, secure, and frictionless content delivery.
caseStudy.results: Achieved a 100% ad-free experience with zero pop-ups, leading to high user retention and engagement.

projects.title: MY SEARCH
projects.description: A fast, free REST API for web search and content scraping with clean JSON output.

caseStudy.problem: Developers need reliable search and scraping capabilities but most solutions are expensive or complicated.
caseStudy.solution: A simple, well-documented REST API that provides clean search results and web scraping functionality.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Built with Next.js API routes and optimized scraping logic for speed and reliability.
caseStudy.results: Fast JSON responses with support for search limits, pagination, and direct URL scraping.
